## Merge checklist

- [ ] Docker build workflow passes
- [ ] **Ran `/codex review` locally** — no `[P1]` findings (or documented exception below)
- [ ] `[P2]` findings addressed or triaged

> Codex review is a **local-only** gate by design (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)).
> `[P1]` findings block merge. `[P2]` are advisory. Exceptions: docs-only, dependency
> bumps, and time-critical hotfixes may skip the gate — state the reason if you do.
